# Fixture: briana_baker_blank_screen_no_repeat
# Model: haiku
# Duration: 17.7s
# Exit: 0
# Failures: 0

## CONVERSATION
Concierge: Hi Briana! Welcome to Shiftsmart.
Partner: I booked a shift and it directed me to do background check. I clicked the get started and it was a blank screen
Concierge: Quit the app fully and reopen it — that usually refreshes things. If it's still not showing, go to the Shifts tab and tap on any shift with a lock icon.
Partner: I did and it didn't work still blank

## CONCIERGE OUTPUT
Sorry that didn't work. Tap the message icon in the top right corner of the app, tap "Send us a message", and let the team know you're seeing a blank screen on the background check — they can help you get unstuck.
